completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-027-001 6-artifact-plus-manifest packet for 51 artifact-quality BLOCKS surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 21 (mode: improve-existing) probe on spec 027. Findings categorized into 7 gate buckets: missing G022 specialist phase records (Check 6), G022 Check 6B provenance impersonation, missing G053 Code Diff Evidence section (Check 13B), Check 5A SLA-substring false-positive needing Stress Test Plan row, missing Check 8A regression E2E DoD bullets + Test Plan rows on all 8 scopes, missing Check 8B Consumer Impact Sweep on Scope 4 tag-delete endpoint, and 10 G068 fidelity prefix gaps (Check 22). Confirmed no prior BUG folder exists under spec 027 (BUG-027-001 is the first). No runtime path is changed; parent 027 stays done.

Applied all three scopes. Scope 1: appended 2 regression E2E DoD bullets + 1 Regression E2E Test Plan row to each of the 8 spec 027 scopes (24 markdown additions) + 1 Stress Test Plan row to Scope 1. Scope 2: added 10 G068 'Scenario "<name>": ' prefixes to existing DoD bullets in Scopes 2/4/5/6 of specs/027-user-annotations/scopes.md; added new '### Code Diff Evidence' section to specs/027-user-annotations/report.md; added '### Consumer Impact Sweep' section + DoD bullet + consumer-surface enumeration to Scope 4 (DELETE tag endpoint). Scope 3: extended specs/027-user-annotations/state.json::certification.certifiedCompletedPhases and execution.completedPhaseClaims with regression/simplify/stabilize/security; appended 7 retroactive bubbles.<phase>:<phase> entries to executionHistory[] (bootstrap, test, validate, regression, simplify, stabilize, security); appended BUG-027-001 to resolvedBugs; advanced lastUpdatedAt. No source-code behavior changed.

Re-ran all three framework guards. state-transition-guard.sh specs/027-user-annotations goes from 51 BLOCKS to 0 BLOCKS (exit 0, TRANSITION ALLOWED). traceability-guard.sh specs/027-user-annotations goes from RESULT: FAILED (11 failures = 10 G068 + 1 rollup) to RESULT: PASSED (0 failures). artifact-lint.sh specs/027-user-annotations continues to PASS. state-transition-guard.sh + artifact-lint.sh on the BUG-027-001 folder itself both exit 0. Integration tests not re-run because zero runtime code changed; tests/integration/auth_annotation_test.go::{TestAnnotation_BodyActorSourceInProduction_Rejected, TestAnnotation_BodyActorIDInProduction_Rejected} and tests/integration/db_migration_test.go::TestMigrations_AnnotationsConstraints remain GREEN by construction at HEAD 012a9f9a.

Parent spec 027 promoted from 51 BLOCKS + 11 trace failures to 0 BLOCKS + 0 trace failures. All three BUG-027-001 scopes promoted Not Started -> Done with checked DoD evidence. Parent 027 status stays done end-to-end; certification fields augmented with 4 new phases and 7 retroactive provenance entries grounded in real report.md probe sections.

BUG packet is artifact-only and adds the minimum content required by gates G022/G053/G068/Check-5A/Check-8A/Check-8B/Check-13B: 16 DoD bullets + 8 Test Plan rows + 1 Stress row on parent 027 scopes (Scope 1), 10 G068 Scenario prefixes + 1 Code Diff Evidence section + Scope 4 Consumer Impact Sweep on parent 027 (Scope 2), 4 specialist phase records + 7 executionHistory entries + 1 resolvedBugs entry + 1 lastUpdatedAt advance on parent 027 state.json (Scope 3). Behavior stability confirmed. Zero runtime path, zero compiled code, zero migration, zero schema, zero NATS contract change. Parent spec 027 retained status=done end-to-end; annotation parser, store, REST API, Telegram bridge (mapping + handler), search extension, and intelligence relevance integration were all left untouched. No flake risk introduced; no test reordering or fixture mutation occurred.

Security posture preserved. Zero secret, credential, token, or auth path touched. gitleaks pre-commit hook will run on the staging set; all PII (linux-home-username-leak) was redacted to ~/ in every evidence block before staging. No new dependency, no new endpoint, no new permission boundary. The 2026-04-22 Security Pass on parent 027 (actor=user-source-of-truth + body.actor / body.actor_id rejection in production) plus the spec 044 Scope 02 cross-spec defensive rejection at API entry remain in force; this packet adds no new attack surface.
